# RouteForce — llms.txt
# For the detailed version with FAQ, comparisons, and technical details, see: https://routeforce.app/llms-full.txt

> RouteForce is a 100% Salesforce-native route planning and field visit tracking application. It is a managed package installed directly in Salesforce orgs.

## What RouteForce does
- Interactive map showing Accounts, Leads, and Opportunities from Salesforce CRM
- Route optimization with configurable time windows, lunch breaks, and visit duration
- GPS check-in/check-out with visit reports (result, satisfaction, next action, order amount)
- Heatmap visualization and bulk lasso-select for batch operations
- 2 dashboards and 18 native Salesforce reports included
- Route history with replay functionality
- Saved and shared filter configurations
- Custom actions via Screen Flows and Lightning Web Components from map markers
- Full Salesforce Mobile App support

## Pricing
- Free plan: map visualization, filtering, event creation, unlimited users
- Pro plan: €599/month per Salesforce org (not per user), includes all features, unlimited users

## Technical details
- 100% Lightning Web Component (LWC) based
- Configuration via Custom Metadata Types (RouteForceConfig__mdt)
- 3 permission sets: Admin, Manager, User
- Route optimization powered by VROOM algorithm via OpenRouteService
- Routing server hosted in France (OVHcloud, Gravelines) for GDPR compliance
- No external data storage — CRM data stays in Salesforce
